channel.title: Comments for page "Black Autumn 3: Discordant Anthology Hub"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Black Autumn 3: Discordant Anthology Hub"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Is it still possible to contribute something? Or was this a one-off opportunity?
(If this discussion is too moldy, I would like to express my apologies for the necromancy.)

item.title: Query: Nexus Details
item.content:encoded: Is there a sample for the types of area classes for the nexuses? Need it for a draft I'm working on.

item.title: questions
item.content:encoded:
does Site-19 Facility 23 (effectively the 914 people) count as a nexus its self?
Cause I see fun things if the 914 team does something with this

item.title: Oh Boy
item.content:encoded: Oh boy it's that time of the year. Black autumn 3 is here. Now this month has a reason aswell.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Noting that I changed the link of SCP-2960 in "Amityville, Missouri" to SCP-2920, which I'm pretty sure is the intended article.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You can do so using the format in the collapsible:

+ show block
– hide block
 [[=]] ++ Name of the Nexus (City, State/Province/Territory, Country) ++ Link to the Work [[/=]] **Area Class:** ##blue|Briar##, ##green|Asphodel##, ##yellow|Camelot##, ##orange|Shangri-La## or ##red|Dunwich##. Consult Nexus Series for more info. **Anomaly Occurrence Value:** ##blue|Low##, ##green|Normal##, ##orange|High##, or ##red|Critical##. This shows how active the nexus is today versus how it usually is. **Threat Level:** See the document linked below, and color text appropriately. I wouldn't bother with Black or White, as the CSS seems to be breaking. **Notes:** Any flavor text to set the scene for your tale. Halloween CSS isn't working consistently for some, so bear that in mind when trying to do hidden text.

Threat Levels are codified here, and the Nexus levels are codified here, under the third collapsible.

Hopefully this gets a little traction.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Oooo, sounds cool! For those of us thinking about making an entry, should we link tales/scips to this page?

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Well, here goes my credibility as a writer.

This has been in my head since I finished Black Autumn II last year, and I've only just managed to pick up the pace on writing it. Work can and will kill your ability to write.

I'm going to attempt to get at least nine tales out before the end of the month, each one focusing on a different nexus. Like I've said before, this is open to pretty much anyone who wants in. Just pick a nexus, pre-existing or otherwise, and write something spooky about it.

Here's hoping that people like what this is going to become. Apologies for clogging up most recently created.
